data.content:
Branch: worktree-b784-progressive-loading
Commit: 5cb86c78

Implementation summary:
- New: use-streaming-progress.ts (hook tracking per-repo streaming state)
- New: streaming-progress-bar.tsx (progress bar with fade-out completion)
- New: beat-table-skeleton-rows.tsx (shimmer placeholders)
- Modified: use-beats-query.ts (integrated streaming callbacks)
- Modified: page.tsx (wired progress bar, conditional streaming UI)
- Modified: beat-table.tsx (isStreaming prop, suppress page reset)
- Modified: beat-table-content.tsx (fade-in animation on new rows)
- Modified: globals.css (beat-row-enter keyframes, reduced-motion)
- 4 new test files, all 235 suites pass (2593 tests)
- Lint, typecheck, build all green
